app.name: PromptCraft Academy
app.subtitle: AI Writing & Coding for Kids
app.description:
PromptCraft Academy is the safest, most engaging way for children ages 6–16 to master AI prompt engineering, creative writing, coding fundamentals, storytelling, math problem-solving, and science exploration — all through hands-on, guided lessons powered by AI.

Built with parents and teachers in mind, every feature is COPPA-compliant and designed to spark curiosity without screen-time guilt. Kids earn badges, level up through six learning tracks, and build a portfolio of real projects they're proud of.

SIX LEARNING TRACKS:
• Prompt Engineering — Teach kids how to talk to AI clearly and creatively
• Creative Writing — Story starters, character builders, and world creation
• Coding Fundamentals — Logic puzzles and beginner programming concepts
• Storytelling & Narrative — Structure, plot, voice, and imagination
• Math Problem-Solving — Word problems made visual and engaging
• Science Exploration — Hypothesis, experiment, and discovery prompts

PARENT & TEACHER DASHBOARD:
• Real-time progress tracking across all six tracks
• Weekly email digests with highlights and insights
• Classroom mode for up to 30 students
• Content controls and daily time limits
• Export portfolios as PDF or share with family

SAFETY FIRST:
• No ads, ever
• No social features or direct messaging
• All AI responses reviewed against strict child-safety filters
• COPPA and GDPR-K compliant
• Data never sold or shared with third parties

FREE & PREMIUM:
The free tier includes full access to one learning track. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited tracks, offline mode, and priority AI response times.
app.promotional_text: New: Classroom Mode now supports up to 30 students with live progress tracking! Teachers get a free Premium account.
app.whats_new:
Version 1.0 — Welcome to PromptCraft Academy!

• Six fully-guided learning tracks launching today
• Parent dashboard with weekly progress digests
• Classroom mode for educators (free Premium with verified .edu email)
• 200+ starter challenges across all tracks
• Badge and achievement system with 50 collectible rewards
• Offline mode for Premium subscribers
• Available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese
